description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant spirit of Mexico with our simple yet captivating email design, perfect for Cinco de Mayo celebrations or any festive occasion. This template combines the mouthwatering appeal of Mexican cuisine with the allure of travel, making it an excellent choice for food and beverage promotions, seasonal specials, or event announcements. Use it to announce sales or festive discounts, adding a touch of Mexican flair to your marketing campaign. With its vivid colors and engaging design, this email template is sure to capture the attention of your audience, driving engagement and boosting conversions. Experience the charm of a traditional Mexican cantina, right in your inbox.
short_description: Experience the vibrancy of Mexico with our simple, captivating email design, perfect for Cinco de Mayo or festive occasions. Ideal for food, beverage, travel promotions, seasonal specials, or event announcements. Boost engagement and conversions with a touch of Mexican flair.

designer.description: Hi! My name is Martin. I’m a web / user interface designer located in Bulgaria, Europe. Since the past 10 years I’ve worked on a variety of projects for small, medium and large companies. I enjoy doing pixel perfect designs with attention to every detail.

html_data:
CINCO DE MAYO

Today only, place your Cinco de Mayo order & get 50% OFF on all your shops. Start saving right now!

GET 50% OFF

CINCO DE MAYO OFFERS

SALSITA

Sauteed Shrimp, Salsa Ranchera, Rice & shredded Cheese.

$9.99
 

BUNNY BURRITO

Your choice of Chicken, Adobada or Carnitas with Pico de Gallo and fresh Guacamole.

$11.99
 

VEGGIE THE VEG

Whole Beans, Rice, crisp Lettuce, Pico de Gallo, Sour Cream, fresh Guacamole & shredded Cheese in a warm Tortilla.

$15.99
 

FISHY

Battered Fish or Grilled Fish with Crisp Cabbage & Pico de Gallo smothered in Chipotle or White Sauce.

$14.99
 
 

ORDER THROUGH
YOUR PHONE!
